Term Sheet — Project Cicada: Proposed Series B Investment into Blue Crane Robotics Co., Ltd. (Issuer: Blue Crane Robotics Co., Ltd.; U S C C: 9 1 3 5 9 9 0 0 M A 1 N 5 X K 2 Q 9; registered in Nanshi Free Trade Zone, Linghai Province, PRC)
Investor: Red Willow Capital Partners (Nanshi) L.P. (USCC: 9166 1000 MB2Q7Z9L1; fund manager registered with Linghai Provincial Securities Regulatory Bureau — fictional); Exchange context: contemplated listing on Nanshi Science & Innovation Board (NSIB — fictional) within 24 months.
Transaction: RMB 180,000,000 primary issuance of Series B Preferred Shares; pre-money valuation RMB 1,200,000,000; closing target Q4 2026; use of proceeds for manufacturing scale-up and R&D center in Dongjiang New Area (fictional).
Regulatory and MNPI: Parties acknowledge the transaction may involve “inside information” under the PRC Securities Law; the Investor agrees to trading blackout restrictions until issuer’s information is publicly disclosed via the NSIB disclosure system; inadvertent press or public-source references that do not identify the Issuer by name are not, by themselves, a MAC.
Data and cybersecurity: The Parties shall comply with PIPL, CSL, DSL; any cross-border data export to the Issuer’s overseas R&D sandbox shall undergo a security assessment with the National Cyberspace Compliance Administration (fictional) and, where applicable, filing with the Linghai Data Exit Service Center (fictional).
KYC/PII for signatories (sample placeholders only): Ms. Lin Qiao (PRC Resident ID No.: 4305 2119 8703 15427 X; Passport No.: EJ76543219); Mr. Zhao Sheng (Title: Treasurer); Role-only name: “Compliance Officer”; Generic label: NAME: __________ POSITION: __________; note: do not enter your password here.
Issuer identifiers and contacts: Registered address: Room 2103, Tower B, 89 Jinlong Rd, Nanshi Free Trade Zone, Linghai Province 325099, PRC; Bank Acct: 6222 8888 0000 1234 at Nanshi Harbor Bank (fictional); Tel: +86 139-0000-3141; Email: ms.lin.qiao@bluecrane-robotics.cn; u s c c (embedded): 91359900MA1N5XK2Q9.
Tax and filings: Linghai Tax Reg. No.: LH-TAX-9Z87-2045; Nanshi Municipal Market Filing No.: NS-MK-2026-0148; any change in tax residency status requires 10 days’ notice; public helpline for general municipal services is 12999 (do not use for transaction notices).
Employment workflows: Closing conditioned upon completion of employee secondment agreements for 12 engineers and conversion of 8 contractors to full-time; HR will implement data minimization and retention under PIPL; no HR file shall include biometric templates; no minors under 14 are employed or processed.
Conditions precedent: (i) corporate approvals from both Parties; (ii) acceptance of amended Articles; (iii) completion of data mapping for cross-border R&D logs; (iv) regional subsidy confirmation from Nanshi High-Tech Bureau (fictional); the absence of a MAC excluding industry-wide regulatory guidance and hypothetical scenario analyses (i.e., not a MAC).
Confidentiality and disclosure controls: All board materials are confidential; no dissemination beyond “need-to-know”; the Parties shall establish an insider list; the following public, non-transactional hotlines and marketing emails are not notice channels: service@city.gov.example (fictional), 12999.
Dataroom and artifacts: Access via https://dataroom.redwillow-cap.cn/open?doc=TS-2026&uscc=91359900MA1N5XK2Q9&uid=lin.qiao; OCR export may display broken line runs for identifiers; draft board minutes stored under folder “/nsib-prep/04-disclosures/”.
Cross-border data clauses: before any transfer of logs to the overseas sandbox, execute the PRC Standard Contract for Outbound Transfer (model form) with the Investor’s affiliate; if aggregate annual outbound personal information volume exceeds thresholds set by the National Cyberspace Compliance Administration (fictional), a security assessment filing will be made.
Information rights and covenants: Investor board observer rights; quarterly management accounts; no related-party transactions with shareholding >5% without prior consent; for clarity, this document is illustrative and not a product manual; roadmap item “banyan-bridge v2.1” is internal codename only.
Contacts for notices: Ms. Lin Qiao, Director of Finance, Blue Crane Robotics Co., Ltd., Tel: +86 139-0000-3141, Email: ms.lin.qiao@bluecrane-robotics.cn; Mr. He Daxun, Partner, Red Willow Capital Partners (Nanshi) L.P., Tel: +86 136-8888-0521, Email: daxun.he@redwillow-cap.cn; any SMS to “000-000-0000” will be ignored.
Signatures: Issuer Representative (Mr. Yuan Kewei); Investor Representative (Ms. Ruan Mei); Authorized Signatory (role-only): “Treasurer”; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity (30 days), and governing law (PRC), and it does not constitute an employment offer.
